D1 Optics L3 Apply Reference

Linear, Circular & Elliptical States

set two amplitudes and a phase shift and watch the electric vector trace its ellipse

Any polarization is two perpendicular oscillations with a phase offset. Their combination sweeps out an ellipse whose shape and tilt encode the state.

Set the x and y amplitudes and the phase shift δ. The traced curve is the polarization ellipse; the readout gives its orientation ψ, ellipticity χ, and handedness.
